Procs

proc emitMessage(emitter: CliOutputEmitter; text: string) {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Emit assistant text according to the configured output mode. Source   Edit

    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

proc ensureTrailingNewline(emitter: CliOutputEmitter; text: string) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Add a trailing newline for raw text mode when the response lacks one. Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Render a single JSON stream event as one JSONL line. Source   Edit
